# Perplexity API Changelog - Complete Content Extract

## Documentation
- **Documentation Index**: https://docs.perplexity.ai/llms.txt
- **Feature Roadmap**: Available for upcoming features

## February 2026 Updates

**Agent API Launch**
- General availability announcement for production-ready autonomous agents
- Features: model behavior controls, output controls, OpenAI-compatibility patterns
- Quickstart: Agent API Quickstart

**Embeddings API Launch**
- Comprehensive guides for standard and contextualized embeddings
- Best practices for semantic search and retrieval workflows
- Quickstart: Embeddings API Quickstart

## December 2025 Updates

**Model Deprecation**: sonar-reasoning removed (12/15/2025)
- Migration path: sonar-reasoning-pro recommended

**Media Classifier**
- Automatic detection of visual content benefit
- Smart media selection (images, videos, or both)
- Exclusive to sonar-pro
- Applications: educational content, geographic queries, processes

**Search API Enhancements**
- New max_tokens parameter for per-page token control
- last_updated_filter support for content freshness filtering
- Vercel AI SDK compatibility

**Community Showcase**: Perplexity Client (Electron-based desktop application)

## November 2025 Updates

**Pro Search - General Availability**
- Multi-step reasoning through intelligent tool orchestration
- Real-time thought streaming
- Automatic query classification (search_type: "auto")
- Built-in tools: web_search, fetch_url_content
- Quickstart: Pro Search Quickstart

**MCP Server - One-Click Installation**
- Support for Cursor, VS Code, Claude Desktop, Claude Code
- Four tools: perplexity_search, perplexity_ask, perplexity_research, perplexity_reason

## October 2025 Updates

**Official Perplexity SDKs**
- Python: pip install perplexityai
- Typescript: npm install @perplexity-ai/perplexity_ai
- Features: type-safe, async/sync clients, streaming support

**Interactive Search API Playground**
- Location: https://console.perplexity.ai
- No API key required for testing

**New Search Capabilities**
- language_preference parameter
- search_domain_filter for targeted searches
- Enhanced date/time filtering

**Community Showcase**: StarPlex (AI-powered startup intelligence platform)

## September 2025 Updates

**File Attachments Support**
- Supported formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT, RTF
- Capabilities: document analysis, content extraction, multi-language support

**Search-only API**
- Standalone endpoint for raw search results
- No LLM processing
- Same filtering options as main API

**API Key Rotation Mechanism**
- Seamless rotation without service interruption
- Automated workflows available
- Features: audit trail, zero-downtime transitions

## August 2025 Updates

**Model Deprecation**: R1-1776 removed (8/1/2025)

## July 2025 Updates

**Detailed Cost Information**
- input_tokens_cost, output_tokens_cost, request_cost, total_cost

**SEC Filings Filter**
- Parameter: search_domain: "sec"

## June 2025 Updates

**Enhanced Date Range Filtering**
- New field: latest_updated

**Academic Filter**
- Parameter: search_mode: "academic"

## May 2025 Updates

**Reasoning Effort Parameter** (sonar-deep-research)
- Options: "low", "medium" (default), "high"

**Asynchronous API** (sonar-deep-research)
- Endpoints for async job management
- TTL: 7 days

**API Response Enhancement**
- New field: search_results with title, URL, date
- Deprecation: citations field fully removed

## April 2025 Updates

**New API Portal**
- Location: https://console.perplexity.ai

**Location Filtering**
**Image Uploads**
**Date Range Filtering**
**Search Context Pricing Update**
**Feature Democratization**

## March 2025 Updates

**Structured Outputs**
**Improved Sonar Models**

## January 2025 Updates

**Model Deprecations** (effective 2/22/2025)
**New API Models: Sonar and Sonar Pro**

## November 2024 Updates

**Citations Public Release**

## July 2024 Updates

**New Sonar Models** (Llama-3.1)

## April 2024 Updates

**Model Deprecations**
